title: A Survey of Learn-to-Compute Paradigms for Rate-Distortion-Type Problems
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, accepted by IEEE BITS
summary: Rate-distortion (RD) theory and its related formulations play a central role in understanding efficient information representation, but computing these quantities remains challenging in high-dimensional settings. Classical iterative methods such as the Blahut-Arimoto algorithm become impractical in high-dimensional domains due to the curse of dimensionality and the intractability of mutual-information terms. Recent advances in neural modeling and differentiable optimization offer a promising alternative through a learn-to-compute paradigm, in which probability distributions and objective functionals are represented by flexible neural parameterizations. This survey presents an overview of neural approaches for evaluating the RD-type objectives. We present three representative families of methods: variational inference, neural mutual-information estimation, and dual-form optimization. By reviewing their theoretical principles, algorithmic techniques, and consistency properties, we elucidate how these methods collectively transform classical RD-type problems into scalable differentiable objectives suitable for deep learning, though challenges remain in large-scale applications. Together, these perspectives offer promising avenues for scaling information-theoretic computation to complex, high-dimensional machine learning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于神经网络的方法来计算率失真（RD）型目标函数，包括变分推断、神经互信息估计和对偶形式优化三大类方法，将经典RD问题转化为可微分的深度学习目标。
AI.motivation: 经典RD理论在高维场景下计算困难（维数灾难、互信息项难处理），亟需可扩展的计算方法。
AI.method: 综述了三类方法：1）变分推断；2）神经互信息估计；3）对偶形式优化。通过神经参数化表示概率分布和目标泛函。
AI.result: 这些方法将经典RD问题转化为可微分的深度学习目标，实现了高维场景下的可扩展计算。
AI.conclusion: 神经方法为信息论计算扩展到高维机器学习系统提供了有前景的途径，但大规模应用仍存在挑战。

title: Contrastive Predictive Coding with Compression for Enhanced Channel State Feedback in Wireless Networks
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
summary: Accurate and timely channel state information (CSI) is essential for next-generation wireless systems, yet existing works treat CSI compression and CSI prediction as separate problems, both in academia and in current 3GPP studies. Consequently, channel aging remains insufficiently addressed within standardized CSI feedback pipelines. In this article, we propose a unified compression-prediction framework that integrates Contrastive Predictive Coding (CPC) directly into the 3GPP-compliant CSI compression architecture. Instead of predicting high-dimensional CSI matrices, our approach forecasts future latent representations and jointly optimizes reconstruction fidelity and temporal predictive coherence via a combined 1-SGCS and InfoNCE objective. This design enables temporal representation learning without increasing feedback overhead. We present two variants: CPC-before-Compression, which performs autoregressive modeling on encoded features prior to quantization, and CPC-after-Compression, which shifts temporal modeling to the base-station to reduce the complexity of users' devices. Evaluations on 3GPP-compliant datasets from Nokia, Oppo, and CATT show that CPC-before-Compression achieves over 90% reconstruction accuracy with 32x lower decoder GFLOPs than the 3GPP baseline, while CPC-after-Compression preserves an identical encoder footprint and the same 64-bit feedback overhead. By unifying compression and prediction within a standardized pipeline, the proposed framework provides an age-aware, computationally efficient CSI feedback solution. The source code is publicly available at: https://github.com/AhmedRadwan02/cpc-3gpp

AI.tldr: 本文提出将对比预测编码(CPC)集成到3GPP CSI压缩架构中，实现压缩与预测的统一，在不增加反馈开销的前提下提升信道老化处理能力。两种变体在多个3GPP数据集上均优于基线方案。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将CSI压缩和CSI预测视为两个独立问题，导致3GPP标准化CSI反馈流程中信道老化问题未得到充分解决。
AI.method: 将对比预测编码(CPC)集成到3GPP CSI压缩架构中，通过1-SGCS和InfoNCE联合目标优化重构保真度和时间预测一致性。提出两种变体：压缩前CPC（用户侧自回归建模）和压缩后CPC（基站侧时序建模）。
AI.result: 在Nokia、Oppo、CATT的3GPP数据集上，压缩前CPC在解码器GFLOPs降低32倍条件下实现超过90%的重构精度；压缩后CPC保持相同的编码器计算量和64比特反馈开销。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在标准化管道内统一了压缩与预测，提供了一种考虑信道老化、计算高效的CSI反馈解决方案。

title: Grover-Based PLS: AUD and Beamforming with Artificial Noise in CD-NOMA
summary: Sixth-Generation (6G) networks will require massive connectivity, ultra-low latency, and robust security, making reliable Active User Detection (AUD) essential for interference control and physical layer protection. This letter proposes a Grover-based physical layer security (PLS) framework for a code-domain non-orthogonal multiple access (CD-NOMA) network, where the base station employs artificial-noise (AN)-assisted beamforming and identifies the active set via Grover's quantum search algorithm. We consider two threat models: passive eavesdroppers formed by detected inactive users, and active eavesdroppers selected as the top f% most frequent transmitters among detected active users. By aligning beams and AN with the Grover-based AUD output, the proposed scheme enlarges the main-wiretap rate gap and significantly improves the average secrecy rate compared with compressive sensing and classical correlation receiver baselines, while approaching maximum-likelihood detection performance with a quadratic reduction in search complexity. The impact of the information/AN power split, the base station transmit power, and the fraction of highly active users treated as eavesdroppers on secrecy is characterized through numerical simulations, and design insights are extracted for 6G PLS under both passive and active eavesdropping.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Grover量子搜索算法的6G CD-NOMA物理层安全框架，通过人工噪声辅助波束赋形和量子活性用户检测，在被动和主动窃听模型下显著提升保密速率，同时将搜索复杂度从线性降至二次方级别。
AI.motivation: 6G网络需要大规模连接、超低时延和鲁棒安全性，可靠的活性用户检测（AUD）对于干扰控制和物理层保护至关重要，现有方法在复杂度和性能间存在权衡。
AI.method: 提出基于Grover量子搜索的物理层安全框架：1）采用码域非正交多址（CD-NOMA）；2）基站使用人工噪声（AN）辅助波束赋形；3）利用Grover量子搜索算法进行活性用户检测；4）考虑被动窃听（检测为不活跃的用户）和主动窃听（活跃用户中发送最频繁的前f%用户）两种威胁模型。
AI.result: 所提方案相比压缩感知和经典相关接收机基线，显著提升了平均保密速率，性能逼近最大似然检测，同时搜索复杂度呈二次方降低。
AI.conclusion: 通过数值仿真刻画了信息/AN功率分配、基站发射功率和高活跃用户比例对保密性能的影响，为6G物理层安全在被动和主动窃听场景下提供了设计见解。

title: From Bit to Block: Capacity Achievement via Product Coding
summary: This paper shows that product coding can convert bit-level reliability into block-level reliability at the same asymptotic rate. The encoding process combines a row code of the target rate with vanishing bit-error probability and a high-rate column code with bounded-distance correction capability. The decoding process first decodes rows, thereby purifying the channel output into a sparse residual error pattern, and then decodes columns to clean the residual errors. We prove that, if the column correction radius exceeds the residual bit-error probability and the column length is large enough for a binomial large-deviation bound to overcome the union bound over columns, then the product code has vanishing block-error probability. Thus a bit-level capacity-achieving family can be converted into a block-level capacity-achieving product-code family. As an application, we construct an RM--BCH product-code family that achieves the capacity of any fixed BMS channel.

AI.tldr: 本文证明乘积码可以在相同渐进速率下将比特级可靠性转换为块级可靠性。通过行码（目标速率、误比特率趋零）与列码（高码率、有界距离纠错）的编解码组合，证明若列纠错半径超过残余误比特率且列长度足够大，则乘积码的误块率趋零，从而实现比特级到块级容量可达的转换。以RM-BCH乘积码族为例，证明其可达任意固定BMS信道的容量。
AI.motivation: 现有编码理论中，比特级可靠性（误比特率）与块级可靠性（误块率）的转换存在速率损失问题，缺乏统一的框架证明二者可在相同渐进速率下等效转换。
AI.method: 采用乘积码结构：行码使用目标速率且误比特率趋零的码，列码使用高码率且有界距离纠错能力的码。解码分两步：先解码行码净化信道输出为稀疏残差错误模式，再解码列码清除残差。通过二项式大偏差界克服列上的联合界来证明块级可靠性。
AI.result: 证明了若列纠错半径大于残余误比特率且列长度足够大，则乘积码的误块率趋零。构建的RM-BCH乘积码族可达任意固定BMS信道的容量。
AI.conclusion: 乘积码可将比特级容量可达码族转换为块级容量可达码族，为实际编码设计提供了理论框架。

title: Replicating the Signature: Unsupervised Targeted Impersonation Attack on RF Fingerprinting
comment: 10 pages, 17 full figures. Accepted at 23rd Annual International Conference on Privacy, Security, and Trust (PST2026)
summary: This paper presents a novel impersonation attack framework that aims to fool RF Fingerprinting (RFFP) identification systems by synthesizing signals that replicate the hardware-specific impairments of a target device. Our framework leverages unsupervised learning to enable accurate impairment estimation, combined with signal processing-based generation to synthesize high-fidelity adversarial signals. Unlike prior works that assume full access to the legitimate (victim) RFFP classifier, we consider a more realistic attack strategy where the adversary performs the attack from a completely different transceiver hardware. We further evaluate our proposed attack under realistic and challenging deployment settings, including over-the-air transmission in both Line-of-Sight (LoS) and Non-Line-of-Sight (NLoS) scenarios. Extensive experiments conducted on a Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) device testbed demonstrate that our attacks remain highly effective even under severe access constraints, significantly outperforming existing baselines in terms of targeted attack success rates by over 80%. We additionally analyze the effects of cross-domain generalization, signal representation mismatch, and classifier diversity, highlighting the robustness and

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型冒充攻击框架，通过无监督学习估计目标设备的硬件指纹特征，并结合信号处理生成高保真对抗信号，能够成功欺骗RF指纹识别系统，在BLE设备测试中达到80%以上的定向攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的RF指纹识别（RFFP）系统容易被攻击，但已有攻击方法大多假设攻击者能完全访问受害者分类器，这在现实中难以实现。本文旨在设计更贴近实际的攻击场景，即攻击者使用完全不同的收发器硬件，且无需访问目标分类器，检验RFFP系统的安全性。
AI.method: 提出一种冒充攻击框架：1）利用无监督学习准确估计目标设备的硬件特定损伤特征；2）结合信号处理方法合成高保真对抗信号；3）攻击者从完全不同的收发器硬件发起攻击，不假设对受害者分类器的完全访问权。
AI.result: 在BLE设备测试平台上，该攻击在视距（LoS）和非视距（NLoS）场景下均高度有效，定向攻击成功率超过现有基线方法80%以上。此外，还分析了跨域泛化、信号表示不匹配和分类器多样性等因素的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的攻击框架在受限访问条件下仍保持高效，显著优于现有基线，揭示了当前RFFP系统在面对更现实攻击时的脆弱性，需要进一步研究防御机制。

title: HAPS as a Hypercell: Enabling Coverage and Capacity Carrier Shutdown in Cellular Networks
summary: Energy consumption remains a dominant operational challenge for current and future cellular systems, especially in dense urban deployments. This paper investigates a novel role for non terrestrial network (NTN) high-altitude platform station (HAPS) as an enabler of energy-efficient operation rather than only coverage extension. We define the HAPS-Hypercell as a wide-area non-terrestrial layer that can assume the coverage role of multiple terrestrial macro-cells, enabling, for the first time, the shutdown of both capacity and coverage macro-cells. We develop a comprehensive third generation partnership project (3GPP)-compliant system model, along with two HAPS-Hypercell pairing architectures that capture the interplay among multiple layers, realistic channel conditions, and distributed carrier shutdown (CS) mechanisms. Our results show that the HAPS-Hypercell can effectively reduce overall network power consumption. We then identify key limitations of a straightforward HAPS integration, laying the groundwork for future optimization and providing key insights for next-generation CS operations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAPS-Hypercell架构，利用非地面网络的高空平台站（HAPS）作为节能使能器，通过替代多个地面宏小区并启用载波关闭机制，显著降低蜂窝网络整体功耗。在3GPP兼容模型下验证了该方案的有效性，并指出了未来优化方向。
AI.motivation: 蜂窝网络（尤其在密集城区）能耗问题严峻，现有研究多将NTN/HAPS仅用于覆盖扩展，未充分挖掘其节能潜力。本文首次探索HAPS作为节能使能器的角色。
AI.method: 定义HAPS-Hypercell广域非地面层；构建3GPP兼容的系统模型；设计两种HAPS-Hypercell配对架构，考虑多层交互、实际信道条件和分布式载波关闭（CS）机制。
AI.result: HAPS-Hypercell能够有效降低整体网络功耗；同时发现直接集成HAPS存在关键局限性。
AI.conclusion: HAPS-Hypercell为下一代蜂窝网络的节能运营提供了新范式，并为未来CS操作优化奠定了基础。

title: DBNN: Neural Spike Classification Using a Deep Binarized Neural Network
summary: Implantable brain-computer interfaces require on-node spike sorting to reduce telemetry bandwidth and power while maintaining reliable neural decoding. This paper presents a hardware-oriented deep binarized neural network (DBNN) spike-sorting system with two binarized hidden layers with 256 neurons and a fixed-point output layer to enable multiplier-free inference dominated by sign-controlled accumulation and bit-wise logic. The proposed classifier operates on compact 16-sample spike waveforms to reduce the implementation cost (16-256-256-3) and achieves a median classification accuracy of 98.7% on both synthetic and in-vivo datasets. An FPGA prototype on a Cyclone V device operates at 50 MHz and requires 528 cycles per spike, corresponding to a 0.01 ms compute latency, while consuming 828 ALMs and 1023 registers with zero DSP blocks. For ASIC feasibility, the DBNN is implemented using FreePDK45-based flow; synthesis in Synopsys Design Compiler indicates an estimated silicon area of 0.014 mm2 and an operating power of 122 nW at 20 kHz under a 1.1 V supply. These results demonstrate that the proposed DBNN spike sorter offers a favorable trade-off between accuracy and implementation cost, supporting low-power, implantable neural interfaces. Overall, the proposed DBNN spike sorter achieves high accuracy (98.7%) with extremely low hardware cost (0.014 mm2, 122 nW at 20 kHz) and multiplier-free operation, making it suitable for low-power, implantable neural interfaces. This paper introduces the first DBNN designed for real-time neural spike sorting, striking an excellent balance between input data size and network complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向植入式脑机接口的深度二值化神经网络(DBNN) spike sorting 系统，采用两轮二值化隐藏层（256神经元）和定点输出层，实现无乘法器推理。在16样本spike波形上达到98.7%的中位分类精度，FPGA原型（Cyclone V, 50MHz）消耗528 cycles/spike（0.01ms延迟），占用828 ALMs和1023寄存器，零DSP块；ASIC实现（FreePDK45, 20kHz, 1.1V）面积仅0.014mm²，功耗122nW。该方法在精度与硬件成本之间取得良好平衡，适合低功耗植入式神经接口。
AI.motivation: 植入式脑机接口需要在节点上进行spike sorting以减少遥测带宽和功耗，同时保持可靠的神经解码能力。传统spike sorting方法计算开销大，无法满足植入式设备对极低功耗和小面积的苛刻要求。
AI.method: 提出一种硬件导向的深度二值化神经网络(DBNN)，包含两个二值化隐藏层（各256神经元）和一个定点输出层，实现无乘法器推理（仅需符号控制累加和位逻辑运算）。网络输入为紧凑的16样本spike波形，结构为16-256-256-3。
AI.result: 在合成和体内数据集上达到98.7%中位分类精度；FPGA原型在50MHz下528 cycles/spike（0.01ms延迟），消耗828 ALMs和1023寄存器，零DSP；ASIC实现面积0.014mm²，功耗122nW（20kHz, 1.1V）。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的DBNN spike sorting系统在精度与实现成本之间取得了有利的权衡，是首个面向实时神经spike sorting设计的深度二值化网络，非常适合低功耗植入式神经接口应用。

title: 6G Sensing Security: Distributed Game-Theoretic RL for Urban Beamforming and Attacker Detection
summary: In next-generation networks, communication systems will no longer be limited to data transmission and will be expected to acquire awareness of the surrounding environment. This leads to the concept of integrated sensing and communication (ISAC), where the same wireless infrastructure is used for both communication and environmental sensing. Thus, ISAC enables the system to transmit information efficiently and observe and interpret channel variations and user behavior. Motivated by this capability, this work focuses on detecting an active attacker in an urban environment scenario, where the attacker intentionally manipulates beamforming directions to increase interference and mislead the transmitter into allocating the main lobe of beam toward itself instead of legitimate users. We apply game-theoretic approaches to model the interaction between legitimate users and the attacker, and integrate the resulting utility-based formulation into a reinforcement learning (RL) framework. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method effectively addresses security challenges in dynamic 6G ISAC systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在6G ISAC系统中，利用博弈论和强化学习检测主动攻击者，防止其通过操纵波束方向干扰通信。
AI.motivation: 下一代通信系统需具备环境感知能力（ISAC），但带来了新的安全威胁——攻击者可通过操纵波束方向误导发射机，需有效检测此类主动攻击。
AI.method: 采用博弈论对合法用户与攻击者的交互建模，将基于效用的公式集成到强化学习（RL）框架中。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法能有效应对动态6G ISAC系统中的安全挑战。
AI.conclusion: 博弈论与强化学习结合的方法在ISAC系统攻击检测中具有可行性，为6G安全通信提供了新思路。

title: Unexpected Far-Near-Far Transition in Mobile Near Field Terahertz Communications
comment: Accepted to IEEE SPAWC, 2026. Copyright 2026 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material, creating new works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
summary: At THz frequencies, the radiative near-field distance can be sufficiently large to matter in real deployments. Existing near-field formulas are often understood in a simple way: as the link distance decreases, the propagation regime is expected to change only once, i.e., from far field to near field. This paper shows that this intuition can fail for an elevated access point with downward tilt serving a ground user moving along the ground. Along such a path, the link distance and the viewing angle change together, so the near-field to far-field transition may take place more than once, creating an unexpected far-near-far transition. In this paper, we derive analytical conditions for when this transition occurs for tilted ULA-to-point and UPA-to-point scenarios and compute the corresponding transition point(s) on the ground. Numerical results validate the analysis and further show that this behavior depends strongly on the deployment geometry and can also arise at lower frequencies.

AI.tldr: 本文发现THz频段下，倾斜接入点与地面用户之间的链路会经历"远场-近场-远场"的多次传播区域转变，打破了传统认为传播状态只从远场向近场单向转变一次的直觉。
AI.motivation: 在THz频段，辐射近场距离足够大，在实际部署中不可忽视。现有近场公式通常认为链路距离减少时传播状态只从远场变为近场一次，但本文质疑这一直觉对于倾斜接入点移动用户的场景是否成立。
AI.method: 推导了倾斜ULA-to-point和UPA-to-point场景下远-近-远多次转变发生的解析条件，并计算了地面上对应的转变点位置。
AI.result: 数值结果验证了理论分析，并进一步表明该行为强烈依赖于部署几何结构，且在较低频段也可能出现。
AI.conclusion: 传统认为传播状态只转变一次的观点在倾斜接入点-地面移动用户的场景下不成立，需要重新审视THz通信中的近场效应。

title: Delay Violation Probability Modeling for 5G Systems with HARQ Operation
summary: Meeting the growing demand for quality-of-service (QoS) guarantees in 5G networks requires an accurate characterization of delay performance, commonly captured by the delay violation probability (DVP) at a specified delay target. Although hybrid automatic repeat request (HARQ) is a fundamental reliability mechanism in wireless systems and is central to supporting QoS, many existing approaches to DVP prediction for HARQ remain overly simplified. In particular, they omit important delay components and adopt assumptions that do not reflect the operation of HARQ in slot-based systems such as 5G. Consequently, these models can substantially underestimate the DVP, especially under stringent latency requirements, where the contribution of the neglected components becomes critical. To address this gap, we develop a tractable DVP characterization for 5G HARQ that accounts for queueing, transmission, decoding, and feedback delay, as well as the contribution of Control Signaling (CS) transmissions to the overall delay, under practical timing assumptions consistent with 3GPP operation. Moreover, we incorporate parallel packet transmissions that proceed without waiting for earlier packets to succeed, an essential HARQ behavior frequently overlooked in prior work. Using tools from queueing theory and Markov analysis, we then derive upper bounds on the DVP and validate them against ns-3 5G-LENA simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对5G网络中HARQ机制的延迟违例概率（DVP）预测问题，提出了一种考虑排队、传输、解码、反馈延迟以及控制信令（CS）传输等实际因素的DVP表征方法，并纳入了并行分组传输这一关键HARQ行为。通过排队论和马尔可夫分析推导出DVP上界，并在ns-3 5G-LENA仿真中验证了模型的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有DVP预测模型过于简化，忽略了重要的时延分量（如排队、解码、反馈延迟及控制信令传输），且假设不符合5G中基于时隙的HARQ实际运行机制，导致在严格时延要求下严重低估DVP，无法满足5G QoS保障的需求。
AI.method: 基于排队论和马尔可夫分析，构建了包含完整时延分量（排队、传输、解码、反馈、控制信令）的DVP理论模型，并纳入并行HARQ传输行为，推导出DVP上界。
AI.result: 通过ns-3 5G-LENA仿真验证，所提模型能够准确刻画5G HARQ的延迟违例概率，优于忽略关键时延分量的简化模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DVP表征方法更贴合3GPP实际运行假设，能够为5G网络的QoS保障提供更可靠的延迟性能分析工具。

title: Sensor-Adaptive Infrared Spectral Reconstruction with Plug-and-Play Diffusion Priors
summary: Hyperspectral sensing enables material identification; however, state-of-the-art spectrometers are costly and bulky, which limits their use in mobile applications. We address this by proposing sparse spectrum reconstruction from narrowband photocurrents using a pseudoinverse-guided diffusion model (ΠGDM). With ΠGDM we use a denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) to reconstruct the spectrum, which is trained on a large public spectral dataset to learn realistic spectral priors, eliminating the need for paired sensor measurements. At inference, ΠGDM alternates reverse-diffusion denoising steps with pseudoinverse projection to enforce consistency with measured photocurrents via the calibrated responsivity matrices of sensors. Consequently, our method is sensor-adaptive: when detector arrays change, we simply substitute the responsivity matrix in the pseudoinverse projection without retraining of the diffusion model. The resulting computational spectrometer achieves 1.502% average estimation error, outperforming Tikhonov, Gaussian, compressive-sensing, and multilayer perceptron (MLP) baselines, while providing calibrated uncertainty estimates via Monte Carlo sampling from different random initializations of ΠGDM. Summarizing, our approach offers an accurate, compact alternative for spectral recovery on resource-constrained platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出伪逆引导扩散模型（ΠGDM），利用扩散模型学习光谱先验并结合伪逆投影实现稀疏光谱重建，无需配对数据训练，可自适应不同传感器，在资源受限平台上实现高精度光谱恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱传感器成本高、体积大，难以用于移动设备。本文旨在开发一种计算光谱重建方法，使用低成本窄带传感器实现精准光谱恢复。
AI.method: 提出ΠGDM框架：使用DDPM在大规模公开光谱数据集上训练，学习真实光谱先验；推理时交替执行逆向扩散去噪步骤与伪逆投影，确保重建结果与传感器测量的光电流一致；改变传感器阵列时仅需替换伪逆投影中的响应矩阵，无需重新训练模型。
AI.result: 平均估计误差1.502%，优于Tikhonov、高斯、压缩感知及MLP基线方法；可通过蒙特卡洛采样提供校准的不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: ΠGDM提供了一种准确、紧凑且传感器自适应的计算光谱重建方案，适合资源受限平台的移动应用。

title: Unique Insertion Error Patterns in Levenshtein's Reconstruction Problem
summary: Levenshtein's sequence reconstruction model plays an essential role in information retrieval of advanced memory systems, such as the DNA-based storage systems. In the model, a word $\mathbf{x}\in\mathbb{Z}_q^n$ is transmitted through $N$ noisy channels, and the goal is to recover it. Errors occurring in the channels usually involve substitutions, insertions and deletions. Our focus is on insertions. One of the main questions in this context is determining the minimum number of channels $N$ required to recover the transmitted word $\mathbf{x}$. The original formulation of the reconstruction problem requires that all the output words from the channels are distinct. However, different insertion errors may lead to the same output words. In this paper, we investigate two reconstruction models where the channels are allowed to produce identical output words even though different insertion errors occur in the channels. These two models, called \textit{the multiset model} and \textit{non-multiset model}, generalize the Levenshtein's model. We denote the minimum number of channels required to \textit{unambiguously} recover the transmitted word $\mathbf{x}\in\mathbb{Z}_q^n$ by $N_q^m(n,t)+1$ in the multiset model and $N_q^{nm}(n,t)+1$ in the non-multiset model, where $t$ is the exact number of insertions occurring in a channel. We determine $N_q^m(n,1)$ and $N_q^{nm}(n,1)$ for all $n$ and $q$, and show the somewhat surprising fact that $N_q^m(n,1)=N_q^{nm}(n,1)$. We also provide a full characterization of the words attaining this value and give a general lower bound on $N_q^m(n,t)$ for $t\ge1$ and a recursive upper bound. For $t=1$, we construct codes $C'\subseteq\mathbb{Z}_q^{n+2}$ from codes $C\subseteq\mathbb{Z}_q^n$ such that the number of channels required to determine the transmitted word $\mathbf{x}\in C'$ is small. This construction is shown to be optimal for certain parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Levenshtein序列重建模型的推广，针对插入错误场景，提出了两种允许通道产生相同输出词的重建模型（multiset模型和non-multiset模型），确定了在单个插入错误下所需的最小通道数，并给出了达到该值的词的完整刻画以及上下界分析。
AI.motivation: 传统Levenshtein重建模型要求所有通道输出词互不相同，但在实际中不同插入错误可能导致相同输出词。因此需要放宽这一约束，研究更一般化的模型。
AI.method: 定义了multiset和non-multiset两种推广模型，通过组合数学方法推导单次插入下的最小通道数，并利用编码构造给出上下界。
AI.result: 确定了对所有n和q，N_q^m(n,1)=N_q^{nm}(n,1)；给出了达到该值的词的完整刻画；给出了t≥1的一般下界和递归上界；对t=1构造了最优码。
AI.conclusion: 放宽输出词互异约束后，单插入下两种模型所需最小通道数相同，且可通过编码构造优化该值。

title: Rydberg Atomic Quantum Radio: A Comprehensive Survey From Wireless Communication Perspective
summary: Next-generation space-air-ground-sea integrated networks (SAGSIN) impose unprecedented demands on advanced radio frequency (RF) receivers for full-spectrum agility, ultra-high sensitivity, and anti-jamming resilience, pushing conventional electronic receivers to their physical limits. To address these challenges, the Rydberg atomic quantum (RAQ) radio has emerged as a promising quantum-enabled receiver paradigm that directly maps electromagnetic fields onto atomic quantum states, offering an alternative to alleviate bottlenecks of conventional RF front ends. To provide a clear research roadmap, this survey presents a comprehensive review of RAQ radios by bridging atomic physics and wireless communications. Specifically, we first introduce the underlying quantum mechanisms, representative architectures, and atomic response models of RAQ radio. On this basis, state-of-the-art techniques for enhancing sensitivity, instantaneous bandwidth, and operating frequency are systematically reviewed, with particular emphasis on the inherent trade-offs among these key metrics. To connect quantum response with communication theory, we further analyze equivalent channel modeling frameworks for characterizing systematic performance limits. From the wireless communication perspective, some RAQ-enabled advanced technologies including cognitive, interference-resilient, low-frequency and multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) communications are reviewed, alongside emerging deployment scenarios such as satellite networks, integrated sensing and communications, and reconfigurable intelligent surface-assisted systems. Finally, we identify open challenges and provide potential future directions of RAQ radio to inspire the further exploration.

AI.tldr: 该综述系统回顾了Rydberg原子量子（RAQ）无线电在空天地海一体化网络中的应用，涵盖其量子机制、架构、性能增强技术、信道建模、通信应用及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统电子接收器在应对空天地海一体化网络对全频谱、超高灵敏度和抗干扰的需求时已达物理极限，RAQ无线电作为量子接收新范式有望突破这些瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过桥接原子物理与无线通信，综述了RAQ无线电的量子机制、原子响应模型、灵敏度/带宽/频率增强技术、等效信道建模框架，以及认知通信、抗干扰通信、低频通信、MIMO等应用。
AI.result: 系统梳理了RAQ无线电的关键性能指标之间的权衡关系，并建立了从量子响应到通信理论之间的桥梁。
AI.conclusion: RAQ无线电为未来SAGSIN提供了极具潜力的解决方案，但仍面临诸多开放挑战，需进一步探索。

title: Sample complexity bounds for the Jensen-Shannon divergence
summary: The Jensen-Shannon divergence (JSD) is a symmetric and bounded measure of the dissimilarity of two probability distributions, which has become a standard tool in statistics, information theory, and machine learning. We complement the understanding of its mathematical properties by presenting an analysis of the amount of data that is needed to distinguish between two distributions, given the value of JSD between them. We find the number of independent and identically distributed samples that suffice for a classifier to determine which of two distributions generated observed data at a desired error rate, for two complementary classifiers: we show that for the log-likelihood-ratio classifier, a sample size that grows as the inverse JSD is sufficient, whereas for a majority-vote classifier assembled from independent single-sample decisions, the sufficient size grows as the squared inverse JSD. These distinct scalings offer operational readings of JSD values and their translation into distinguishability in different contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Jensen-Shannon散度（JSD）与分布区分所需样本量之间的关系，发现对数似然比分类器所需样本量随JSD的倒数增长，而多数投票分类器所需样本量随JSD的平方倒数增长。
AI.motivation: 尽管JSD已成为衡量分布差异的标准工具，但关于给定JSD值下需要多少数据才能区分两个分布的问题尚未被充分理解，作者希望填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 作者从理论上分析了两种互补分类器（对数似然比分类器和多数投票分类器）在给定JSD值下，区分两个分布所需的独立同分布样本量，推导出样本量与JSD之间的标度关系。
AI.result: 对数似然比分类器所需样本量随JSD的倒数增长（~1/JSD），而多数投票分类器所需样本量随JSD的平方倒数增长（~1/JSD²）。
AI.conclusion: JSD值可以直接转化为不同场景下的可区分性度量，为JSD提供了可操作的解读方式，有助于在不同分类器设置下理解分布区分所需的样本量。

title: Cell-Level Channel Shaping for Rydberg Atomic Quantum Receivers in Satellite Uplinks With Doppler-Enabled Superheterodyne Reception
summary: In this paper, we propose a self-superheterodyne Rydberg uniform array receiver for satellite uplink communications, in which the Doppler shift naturally induced by satellite motion is exploited to generate the intermediate-frequency signal. We first develop a near-field local oscillator (LO) synthesis model and characterize the spatially varying LO electric field across the Rydberg vapor cells. Based on a vapor-cell-center approximation, a closed-form radio frequency (RF)-to-optical conversion is derived, establishing an explicit bridge between the incident satellite signal and the LO-induced cell-level response. The derived model reveals that the programmable LO serves as an analog-domain channel-shaping mechanism by controlling the cell-level transduction gain, phase response, and phase-matching behavior. Building upon this equivalent channel model, we formulate an LO design problem that maximizes the Shannon capacity of the effective channel, and develop an efficient optimization algorithm for the LO amplitudes and phases. Simulation results demonstrate that the vapor-cell transduction can reshape the effective channel, adjust the beam-pattern alignment, and moderately reduce the inter-user correlation under suitable LO configurations. Furthermore, the proposed LO design significantly improves the achievable capacity over benchmark schemes, offering a promising self-superheterodyne Rydberg architecture for future satellite communication systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自超外差里德伯均匀阵列接收机，利用卫星运动产生的多普勒频移生成中频信号。通过近场本振合成模型和闭式射频-光转换推导，揭示了可编程本振作为模拟域信道整形机制的作用，并设计了优化本振幅度与相位的算法，显著提升了信道容量。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星上行链路接收机面临复杂度和性能瓶颈，里德伯原子接收机虽具有高灵敏度优势，但如何利用其阵列特性并结合卫星运动天然产生的多普勒效应实现高效信号接收，尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 1. 建立近场本振合成模型，刻画跨里德伯蒸气胞的空间变化本振电场；2. 基于蒸气胞中心近似，推导出闭式射频-光转换公式；3. 将可编程本振建模为模拟域信道整形机制，控制胞级转换增益、相位响应和相位匹配；4. 以最大化有效信道香农容量为目标，设计本振幅度与相位的优化算法。
AI.result: 仿真表明，蒸气胞转换可重塑有效信道、调整波束对准，并在合适的本振配置下适度降低用户间相关性；所提本振设计方案相比基准方案显著提升了可达容量。
AI.conclusion: 自超外差里德伯均匀阵列架构为未来卫星通信系统提供了一种有前景的方案，利用多普勒效应实现自中频生成，结合可编程本振的优化设计，在容量性能上展现明显优势。

title: Rethinking Fronthaul Topologies for Cell-Free 6G Networks
summary: Due to significant progress in physical layer (PHY) technologies, future 6G networks are expected to feature much denser antenna deployments. Cell-free MIMO network designs are one of the most promising candidates to enable denser networks. While significant effort has been put into its PHY research, the challenges it brings to networking disciplines remain relatively unexplored. In this work, we propose various fronthaul network designs for cell-free MIMO. Our results show that while tree topologies may suffice for small-scale deployments, they become infeasible as the number of antennas increases. In contrast, with growing network size, the proposed Clos topology performs almost as well as the optimal topology.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无蜂窝MIMO网络的回传网络设计，发现Clos拓扑在大规模部署中性能接近最优，而树形拓扑仅适用于小规模场景。
AI.motivation: 6G网络物理层技术进步导致天线密度大幅增加，无蜂窝MIMO是很有前景的设计方案，但其对网络层的挑战（特别是回传网络设计）尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出了多种面向无蜂窝MIMO的回传网络拓扑设计方案，包括树形拓扑和Clos拓扑等，并通过仿真对比了不同规模下的性能表现。
AI.result: 树形拓扑在小规模部署中可以胜任，但随天线数量增加变得不可行；Clos拓扑在网络规模增长时性能接近最优拓扑。
AI.conclusion: 针对大规模无蜂窝MIMO网络，Clos拓扑是回传网络设计的有效方案，能很好地平衡可扩展性与性能。

title: Mixture-of-Experts Deep Reinforcement Learning for Reliability-Constrained Energy-Efficient PDCCH Monitoring in Internet of Thing Device
summary: The continuous monitoring of the physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) is a major source of energy consumption in fifth-generation (5G) Internet of thing device (IoT-D), since the UE has to blindly detect downlink control information even when no valid scheduling grant is present. Although predictive dynamic power management can reduce unnecessary receiver activity by skipping PDCCH monitoring in grant-free slots, aggressive sleeping may lead to missed grants and degrade reception reliability. To address this tradeoff, this paper formulates UE-side PDCCH monitoring as a reliability-constrained long-term energy minimization problem. Specifically, the IoT-D determines, before observing the actual scheduling outcome, whether to monitor the PDCCH or switch the receiver chain into a low-power state. The objective is to minimize the long-term average energy consumption, including receiver operating energy, component switching energy, and prediction-related computational energy, while ensuring that the false negative rate of scheduling-grant detection remains below a prescribed threshold. The resulting problem is non-convex due to the bursty and temporally correlated nature of grant arrivals, and the binary monitoring decisions coupled by a long-term reliability constraint. To solve this problem, we propose a mixture-of-experts input-output hidden Markov model (MoE-IOHMM)-based predictive monitoring scheme, where multiple IO-HMM experts capture heterogeneous grant-arrival patterns and a gating network adaptively combines their predictions. Simulation results show that the proposed scheme effectively reduces IoT-D-side energy consumption compared with always-on PDCCH monitoring and conventional predictive baselines, while maintaining the false negative rate below the prescribed reliability threshold.

AI.tldr: 本文针对5G物联网设备中PDCCH连续监测导致的高能耗问题，提出了一种基于混合专家输入输出隐马尔可夫模型（MoE-IOHMM）的预测性监测方案，在满足可靠性约束（假阴性率低于阈值）的前提下最小化长期平均能耗，仿真验证了其相较于传统方案能有效降低能耗并保持可靠性。
AI.motivation: 5G物联网设备需持续监测PDCCH以盲检下行控制信息，即使无有效调度授权也需频繁唤醒接收机，导致大量不必要的能量消耗。如何在减少无效监测（节能）与不错过真实调度授权（可靠性）之间取得平衡，是本文的核心动机。
AI.method: 将PDCCH监测建模为可靠性约束下的长期能量最小化问题，决策变量为二元监测动作（监测/睡眠），约束条件为调度授权检测的假阴性率低于预设阈值。由于授权到达具有突发性和时间相关性，问题非凸。提出MoE-IOHMM预测方案，多个IO-HMM专家分别捕获不同授权到达模式，门控网络自适应融合各专家预测结果以指导监测决策。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提MoE-IOHMM方案相较于始终监测PDCCH的传统方案以及常规预测基线方法，能有效降低物联网设备侧的能耗，同时将假阴性率维持在规定的可靠性阈值以下。
AI.conclusion: 通过预测性睡眠调度与多专家融合建模，可以在不牺牲可靠性（即不显著增加漏检率）的前提下显著降低5G物联网设备的PDCCH监测能耗，为绿色物联网通信提供了可行方案。

title: Constrained Capacity Analysis for Faster-than-Nyquist Signaling
summary: This paper studies the constrained-capacity for precoded faster-than-Nyquist (FTN) signaling with finite-alphabet inputs. Despite the promise of accelerated transmission, the fundamental rate limit of precoded FTN signaling under practical finite-alphabet constraints remains unclear. By introducing cyclic prefix (CP) and cyclic suffix (CS), the FTN channel is decomposed into a set of parallel eigenchannels by the discrete Fourier transform (DFT) matrix, based on which the constrained capacity is derived. The results demonstrate that time acceleration can improve spectral efficiency over Nyquist signaling even when a fixed modulation order is employed. Moreover, in the low and moderate signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) regimes, a smaller constellation combined with stronger time acceleration can outperform a larger constellation with weaker acceleration. Next, the asymptotic behavior of the constrained capacity is analyzed as the acceleration factor tends to zero under both fixed transmit-SNR and fixed receive-SNR definitions. It is shown that the constrained capacity for DFT-precoded FTN is fundamentally limited by the constellation size. In addition, the constrained capacity under channel mismatch is studied and a mismatched achievable information rate (AIR) formulation is developed to show the effects of practical constraints on the performance degradation. Finally, adaptive bit loading across eigenchannels is investigated to exploit the higher-quality eigenchannels.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了有限字母输入下预编码超奈奎斯特（FTN）信号的受限容量，通过循环前缀/后缀将FTN信道分解为并行特征信道，推导了受限容量，并分析了加速因子、星座大小、信噪比等对频谱效率的影响，最后研究了自适应比特加载。
AI.motivation: 超奈奎斯特（FTN）信号在加速传输方面有潜力，但实际有限字母输入下的基本速率极限尚不明确，因此需要研究其受限容量。
AI.method: 引入循环前缀（CP）和循环后缀（CS），利用离散傅里叶变换（DFT）矩阵将FTN信道分解为并行特征信道，推导受限容量；分析加速因子趋于零时的渐近行为；研究信道失配下的可达信息率（AIR）；探索自适应比特加载。
AI.result: 时间加速即使在固定调制阶数下也能提升频谱效率；低中SNR时，小星座强加速可优于大星座弱加速；受限容量受星座大小根本限制；信道失配导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 预编码FTN信号在有限字母输入下能提升频谱效率，但其容量受星座大小限制，自适应比特加载可利用高质量特征信道进一步优化性能。

title: Bending Beam for THz Wireless Networks: Fundamental, Design Issue, and Prototype
summary: Bending beams, characterized by their non diffracting and self-healing properties in the near field, offer a new approach to bypass blockage in terahertz (THz) wireless communication and sensing. However, the investigations of bend ing beams in the context of wireless communications still remain at an early stage. This article provides a state-of-the-art review of the fundamentals and key application scenarios of bending beams in THz wireless communications and sensing. We first present and compare the existing beamforming design and practical hardware implementation methods for bending beams. Next, we discuss potential applications of bending beams in wireless communica tions and sensing and identify their associated challenges, such as blocked channel modeling, bending beam training, codebook design, etc. Finally, a hardware demonstration of bending beam over THz frequency bands is presented, validating the advantages of bending beam over conventional beamfocusing.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了弯曲波束在太赫兹无线通信与感知中的基础原理、关键应用场景及挑战，并通过硬件实验验证了其相较于传统波束聚焦的优势。
AI.motivation: 弯曲波束具有近场非衍射和自愈特性，可绕过障碍物，但目前其在无线通信中的研究仍处于早期阶段，缺乏系统性的综述。
AI.method: 首先对比现有弯曲波束的波束赋形设计与硬件实现方法，然后讨论其在通信与感知中的潜在应用及挑战（如阻塞信道建模、波束训练、码本设计等），最后进行太赫兹频段的硬件演示验证。
AI.result: 硬件演示证实了弯曲波束在太赫兹频段优于传统波束聚焦的性能，尤其是在绕过遮挡方面。
AI.conclusion: 弯曲波束为太赫兹通信中的阻塞问题提供了新的解决思路，但相关信道建模、波束训练等关键技术仍需进一步研究。

title: Joint Probabilistic and Geometric Constellation Shaping for Complexity-Constrained Direct Detection Optical Systems
comment: Accepted for a poster presentation at the European Conference on Optical Communication 2026 (ECOC)
summary: We evaluate joint probabilistic and geometric constellation shaping via reinforcement learning for complexity-constrained joint equalization and demodulation of direct detection optical signals. We demonstrate the proposed technique in a simulated 56 GBd, 2.2 km C-band direct-detection system, demonstrating its effectiveness for complexity-constrained receivers.

AI.tldr: 本文利用强化学习对复杂度受限的直接检测光信号进行联合概率和几何星座整形，并在56 GBd、2.2 km C波段直接检测系统中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 在复杂度受限的接收机中，直接检测光信号的均衡和解调需要联合优化，且传统星座整形方法在复杂度约束下性能受限。
AI.method: 采用强化学习对联合概率和几何星座整形进行优化，实现复杂度受限下的联合均衡与解调。
AI.result: 在56 GBd、2.2 km C波段直接检测仿真系统中验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习可有效实现复杂度受限接收机下的联合概率几何星座整形，提升直接检测光信号的性能。

title: A Hardware-Aware Open-Source Framework for Design Space Exploration of Mixed-Signal Spiking Neural Networks
summary: Energy-efficient neuromorphic computing at the edge requires simulation tools that can capture the non-ideal behavior of mixed-signal spiking neural network (SNN) hardware while supporting system-level design exploration. This work presents an open-source hardware-aware simulation framework for mixed-signal SNNs that enables comparative analysis across neuron, synapse and architecture choices. The framework supports multiple neuron models, including Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF), Hodgkin-Huxley (HH) and Axon-Hillock (AH), together with non-volatile analog synapses based on floating-gate transistors and ReRAM devices. By incorporating device-level nonlinearities directly into PyTorch-based training and inference, the tool enables optimization of physical synaptic parameters rather than idealized abstract weights. The framework is evaluated on standard neuromorphic benchmarks, including N-MNIST, DVS Gesture and Spiking Heidelberg Digits (SHD). For each model dataset configuration, it reports classification accuracy together with hardware-oriented metrics such as silicon area, power consumption and quantization sensitivity. These capabilities enable cross-layer design space exploration and help identify neuron-synapse configurations that best satisfy application-specific constraints on accuracy, energy efficiency, area and hardware fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向混合信号SNN的开源硬件感知仿真框架，支持LIF、HH、AH等多种神经元模型及浮栅晶体管、ReRAM等非易失模拟突触，在PyTorch中集成器件级非线性优化物理突触参数，并在N-MNIST、DVS Gesture、SHD基准上评估分类精度及面积、功耗、量化敏感度等硬件指标，实现跨层设计空间探索。
AI.motivation: 边缘节能神经形态计算需要能够捕获混合信号SNN硬件非理想行为并支持系统级设计探索的仿真工具，现有工具缺乏对多种神经元-突触配置的跨层比较分析能力。
AI.method: 开发开源硬件感知仿真框架，集成LIF、HH、AH三种神经元模型及浮栅晶体管、ReRAM模拟突触，在PyTorch训练和推理中直接嵌入器件级非线性，实现物理突触参数优化而非理想化权重。
AI.result: 在N-MNIST、DVS Gesture、SHD三个标准神经形态基准上评估，报告分类准确率以及硅面积、功耗、量化敏感度等硬件指标，支持跨层设计空间探索。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够帮助识别满足应用特定精度、能效、面积和硬件保真度约束的最佳神经元-突触配置，实现跨层设计空间探索。
